name: fabiodalez-dev/cimaise
description: Minimalist photography CMS (PHP 8.2, Slim 4, Twig, MySQL, Vite, Tailwind, GSAP)

suggest.ext-vips: libvips PHP extension — fast, low-memory image-variant generation (#109); install jcupitt/vips alongside it
suggest.jcupitt/vips: libvips bindings used by App\Services\Imaging\ImageEngine for the fast variant path (HEIC read, AVIF/JPEG-XL write when the libvips build supports them)
suggest.ext-imagick: Imagick is the fallback image engine and provides HEIC read + AVIF write when libvips is unavailable
suggest.spatie/image-optimizer: optional CLI optimizer chain (jpegoptim/pngquant/cwebp/avifenc) for smaller variants
